title: Corporate Services & Admin Executive (Medical Aesthetic)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Corporate Admin & Operations Executive who enjoys organizing, coordinating, and supporting day-to-day business activities. This role is suitable for someone early in their career who likes a mix of office administration and hands-on operations work, and wants exposure across corporate, business support and HR.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide comprehensive corporate and office administrative support, including preparation of business reports, tracking deadlines and maintaining organised records and filing systems.
  • Prepare internal memorandums and assist with business correspondence.
  • Process staff claims and support the execution of HR-related administrative processes.
  • Support day-to-day business and operations (scheduling, coordination, tracking follow-ups, clinic and office supplies control).
  • Maintain proper documentation to meet applicable legal and government requirements and support audits or internal reviews when needed.

Requirements

  • Diploma / A-Level / Degree in Business administration or related field
  • 1–3 years of experience in administrative, office support or coordination roles preferred
  • Fresh graduates with strong interest in corporate / admin work are welcome to apply
  • Comfortable with Microsoft Office / Google Workspace (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
  • Good written and spoken English and Mandarin communication skills, to correspond with our China counterparts when required
  • Organised, meticulous and able to handle multiple tasks
  • Willing to be hands-on with operations and support different teams when needed

What You Can Gain

  • Exposure to corporate, HR and operations functions in a growing organization
  • Experience working closely with management and frontline teams
  • Opportunities to build strong organisational, coordination and communication skills

Benefits

  • 5-day workweek
  • Comprehensive medical and hospital benefits.
  • Generous complimentary treatments for wellness and aesthetics up to $6K per annum.
  • Convenient office location near to MRT stations.

📋 Application
Complete the form before applying:
https://forms.gle/BANHb1kAYwBY7k6D8


Pay package within the stated range will be commensurate with relevant experience and educational qualifications.


Please be advised that only candidates who have completed the form and are subsequently shortlisted will be notified.

postedCompany.description: ClearSK manages the award-winning ClearSK® chain of medi-aesthetic centres with presence in Singapore, Shanghai, Hangzhou and Kuala Lumpur. As a Singapore leading aesthetics and healthcare chain, you are expected to achieve high sales and have the opportunity to collaborate closely with aesthetic doctors and clinicians. It will be a great opportunity for you to grow and learn in a multi-disciplinary environment with medical and management professionals. If you have the drive, adaptability and proven sales ability in beauty, wellness and consumer lifestyle sectors, we welcome you to apply.
postedCompany.name: CLEARSK HEALTHCARE PTE. LTD.
